executive_summary: On March 16, 2026, the automated triage system processed 58 CrowdStrike alerts for Rocket Companies. 11 alerts were escalated immediately — primarily confirmed malicious AI-powered IOA and Machine Learning detections, concentrated on WIN11B-7KO935PI. 9 borderline cases were escalated for review, and 23 benign alerts were auto-closed. No analyst verdict overrides were recorded for this period.

feedback.no_overrides_text: No analyst overrides recorded for this period.
